categories.name: Preventive Maintenance
categories.longDesc: A well-run preventive plan is the difference between scheduling a stop and suffering one. We define a calendar with you by mileage or operating hours, and every visit goes into the equipment's service record with a technical report.

categories.name: Corrective Maintenance
categories.longDesc: When something has already failed, the goal is simple: get the equipment back in operation fast and right. We diagnose the root cause, repair on-site or in-shop, and hand over with documented functional testing.

categories.name: Predictive Maintenance
categories.longDesc: We monitor equipment data in operation to intervene right before failure, not after: fewer unplanned stops, longer useful life, and maintenance decisions based on real trends.
